title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 13 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 13 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 13 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/05/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures moved downwards after a higher opening and held up well throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2509 eventuallyclosed at 714.5, up 1.06% for the day. Traders sold goods in line with market conditions, while steel mills purchased as needed.
